sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Stornoway Airport Café Update. Closed for January holiday break.

Tickets for Wick - Aberdeen service now sale. The Highland Council have announced that tickets are now available to book for flights between Wick John O'Groats and Aberdeen International Airport.

Successful Wick–Aberdeen Air Service Operator Announced. The Highland Council has confirmed that Air Charter Scotland has been appointed as the operator of the Wick–Aberdeen air service.

sections.heading: Context
sections.content: These developments affect aviation connectivity, airspace management, and surface access to airports. Readers interested in Scottish aviation heritage may find parallels in the industrial and operational history documented in our research volumes.

sourceReferences.citationText: hial-airports – Tickets for Wick - Aberdeen service now sale
hial-airports – Successful Wick–Aberdeen Air Service Operator Announced
